usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 7 booking artifacts were ingested successfully with correct type classification, confirmation codes, and provider extraction. ExtractBookingField returned accurate, specific answers for all 7 targeted questions, correctly cross-referencing the raw text. The Hanoi hostel disambiguation was perfect (correctly isolated from Hue and Saigon hostels). The negative test correctly identified that hotel wifi info is not in a flight confirmation without hallucinating. Booking parsing and field extraction are production-quality.

flight.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
flight.answer: Your outbound flight, DL 472, departs from New York (JFK) Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT.

hotel.question: What is the cancellation policy?
hotel.answer: You can cancel for free until June 12, 2026, at 11:59 PM CEST. If you cancel after this date, the first night (EUR 289.00) will be charged. In case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.
hotel.expected: Free cancellation until June 12, first night EUR 289.00 penalty after, full stay for no-show

activity.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
activity.answer: Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), C/ de la Marina 253. Bring valid photo ID, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, water bottle, confirmation, shoulders and knees covered.

car_rental.question: What insurance is included and what's the fuel policy?
car_rental.answer: Super CDW (zero excess) and Theft Protection. Fuel policy: Full-to-Full.

hostel.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
hostel.answer: Check-in at the Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM.

ryokan.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
ryokan.answer: Kaiseki Dinner and Traditional Japanese Breakfast. Dinner at 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM.

tour.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
tour.answer: 12 tastings. Vegetarian and gluten-free with advance notice, vegan substitutions for most stops.

negative_test.question: What is the hotel's wifi password?
negative_test.answer: I'm sorry, the provided text is a flight booking confirmation and does not contain any information about a hotel or its Wi-Fi password.
